title: Triple T
about: Triple T is a nickname for the Italian Brainrot character Tung Tung Tung Sahur, based on the three Ts in his name. The name came from a Tung Tung Tung Sahur Baseball GIF meme, in which Triple T is seen replacing a baseball player at bat. Triple T retained viral use on TikTok and Twitter / X, among other social media platforms, heading into late 2025.
origin: On September 30th, 2025, TikToker[1] @littlebitofeverything039 shared a video caption meme using the Tung Tung Tung Sahur Baseball GIF as the background with the caption reading, "I'm crine bruh, why they got Triple T on the field." Over three months, the video received over 28,900 likes. It is currently the first known use of Triple T to describe Tung Tung Tung Sahur.
